mapper.select: SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( seller_id, category_id, name, description, price, sale_price, stock, delivery_fee, free_shipping, status, image_l, image_s, sale_price_updated_at ) VALUES ( #{seller_id}, #{category_id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{sale_price}, #{stock}, #{delivery_fee}, #{free_shipping}, 'APPROVED', #{image_l}, #{image_s}, CASE WHEN #{sale_price} > 0 THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END )
mapper.update:
UPDATE products SET category_id = #{category_id}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price},
sale_price_updated_at = CASE WHEN sale_price != #{sale_price} THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE sale_price_updated_at END,
sale_price = #{sale_price}, stock = #{stock}, delivery_fee = #{delivery_fee}, free_shipping = #{free_shipping},
image_l = #{image_l}, image_s = #{image_s}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_id = #{product_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND sale_price > 0 ORDER BY sale_price_updated_at DESC, product_id DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{blockList}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND sale_price > 0
SELECT * FROM products WHERE status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT * FROM products
status = #{status}
ORDER BY price ASC
ORDER BY price DESC
ORDER BY stock ASC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
mapper.update: update products set status=#{status} where product_id=#{product_id}
mapper.delete:
delete from products where product_id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{seller_id} AND status = 'APPROVED'
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price IS NOT NULL AND sale_price > 0 THEN sale_price ELSE price END ASC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN sale_price IS NOT NULL AND sale_price > 0 THEN sale_price ELSE price END DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
ORDER BY product_id DESC
